title: erycibe hellwigii
intro: Erycibe hellwigii, also known as the Devil's Backbone, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erycibe hellwigii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating infections, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in Southeast Asian cultures to harness its medicinal properties.
